title: Crispy Tangy Spinach Stir-fry
description: A show-off Korean dish featuring spinach that is crispy and tangy with a dash of friendly flavors.

ingredients.name: Spinach
ingredients.notes: Ensure leaves are tightly packed for better texture

ingredients.name: Lemon Juice
ingredients.notes: To add tanginess and brightness to the dish

ingredients.name: Olive Oil
ingredients.notes: For sautéing spinach and adding crispness

instructions: Preheat a non-stick skillet over medium-high heat. Add olive oil and garlic, cooking until fragrant.
Add spinach to the pan, tossing frequently with tongs or a spatula until wilted and starting to crisp up on top.
Drizzle soy sauce, mirin, and lemon juice evenly over the spinach mixture.
Stir quickly to combine all ingredients, ensuring spinach is thoroughly coated. Cook for an additional 1-2 minutes until slightly crispy.
Season with salt if needed and serve immediately.
